allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); da=d['disease_association']; cd=d['cancer_dependency']; print\('OT:', da['overall_score'] if da else None, 'evidence_breakdown:', da['evidence_breakdown'] if da else None\); print\('DepMap pan_essential:', cd['pan_essential'] if cd else None, 'frac:', cd['fraction_dependent_lines'] if cd else None\); print\('Score:', d['priority_score']\)")
